title: Basic JavaScript Enhanced Object Literals
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Enhanced Object Literals. Focus on implementing Property shorthand (name: name -> name) correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Enhanced Object Literals
description: Create a function that uses Property shorthand (name: name -> name) and Method shorthand together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Enhanced Object Literals Project
description: Build a small application that applies Property shorthand (name: name -> name), Method shorthand, Computed property keys in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Enhanced Object Literals
description: The following code has bugs related to Property shorthand (name: name -> name). Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Enhanced Object Literals
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Property shorthand (name: name -> name) and Method shorthand.
